chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1438 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case. 16-10-2025 Mr. Shahbaz Hussain Bajwa, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Abdul Mujeeb Shaikh, Advocate for respondents-SEPCO. Mr. Naveed Ahmed Shah, D.A.G. **** Learned counsel for the respondents–SPECO files a statement along with a copy of bill, which is taken on record, and a copy thereof is provided to the learned counsel for the petitioner. Mr. Shaikh submits that grievance of the petitioner has now been redressed. After such statement, counsel for the petitioner confirms the same and, under instructions, does not press the instant petition, which is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
